case_title: EMILY BARRAGAN et al VS. LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SOPHIE LAU--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
